parameters.name: Gear Axis Variable Toggle
parameters.description: Setting to 1 will use the gear variable that changes slightly before next gear on AT/DCT; Otherwise it will use the gear variabe that is held until the TCU registers shift fully complete (updates a fe

parameters.name: Enable Custom WGDC Override
parameters.description: Setting to 1 will override the base WGDC % with the value from our MHD+ Custom WGDC Base table. Note: OEM WGDC I-Factor will still be active as well. Zero them out if not desired.

parameters.name: Enable Custom WGDC P and D Factors
parameters.description: Setting to 1 will apply the output of our MHD+ Custom WGDC P and D factor tables to WGDC base (custom or OEM).

parameters.name: WGDC P-Factor (Custom)
parameters.description: Output of this table gets added to (or subtracted from) WGDC Base % when then custom factor enable flag is set

parameters.name: WGDC D-Factor (Custom)
parameters.description: Output of this table gets added to (or subtracted from) WGDC Base % when then custom factor enable flag is set

parameters.name: WGDC P-Factor (Custom) (Antilag)
parameters.description: Output of this table gets added to (or subtracted from) WGDC Base % when then custom factor enable flag is set (during antilag)

parameters.name: WGDC D-Factor (Custom) (Antilag)
parameters.description: Output of this table gets added to (or subtracted from) WGDC Base % when then custom factor enable flag is set (during antilag)

parameters.name: WGDC Dynamic RPM Adder
parameters.description: KF_ATLVSTNDYN - This table adds additional WGDC depending on gear and RPM gradient.

parameters.name: WGDC Final Adder
parameters.description: K_TVWGMIN - This value is added to the calculated WGDC value before it is output to the boost solenoid(s).
